name: MEMBER OF THE EDIT BY CHASE TRAVEL
location: Located down an unassuming alleyway in the medina, La Sultana offers an elevated take on traditional Moroccan accommodations, plus a location that makes it ideal for days spent exploring and nights on the town. The hotel is spread across five unique riads and features 28 rooms and suites, along with a stunning pool, two restaurants (including a top-rated fine-dining spot), a rooftop fitness center and game room, and cozy sitting areas at every turn. It’s quintessentially Moroccan and incredibly charming.
sourceTitle: Marrakech Hotels With Special Cardmember Benefits | Chase Travel
